reviews.comment: Brian was outstanding as a CPR/AED instructor, highly recommended!!

reviewReply.comment:
Thank you for your review, Mark! We appreciate your feedback.  

Have you ever considered organizing CPR classes for your church or HOA? It's a wonderful opportunity to empower others with life-saving skills and create a safer community.

In addition, placing an AED in your church or HOA can greatly enhance emergency response capabilities and increase the chances of saving lives. By taking these proactive steps, you can make a significant difference and ensure the well-being of those around you.

We know training groups and AEDs are expensive ... and,  we have solutions:   fun and engaging, low-cost, non-cerification CPR classes and a no-upfront cost AED program. 

Please don't hesitate to reach out... or, visit https://bit.ly/AED-Lease

If your organizations' are seeking on-site, industry-tailored CPR and Bloodborne Pathogens training with a focus on simulating real work scenarios and incorporating specific equipment, we would appreciate your recommendation of 910CPR. Our approach includes using on-site equipment during practical training, ensures a realistic and effective learning experience.  Stay safe and 'Thanks' again! 🌟👍
